arts.ttl: Arsenal stars to pay tribute to Gabriel Jesus ahead of the north London derby with Tottenham - after the Brazilian suffered an ACL injury in their FA Cup defeat by Man United
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE BY SAMI MOKBEL: Arsenal players are planning a touching tribute to stricken injured team-mate Gabriel Jesus ahead of their clash against arch-rivals Tottenham tonight.

arts.ttl: Tottenham and Everton need to pay $20m if they want midfielder, source at Brazilian club shares
arts.sum: Everton and Tottenham will need at least $20m if they wish to sign Richard Ríos from Palmeiras this month. That’s according to Caracol Radio and AS Colombia, who both cover the Colombian midfielder today. arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Tottenham injury news in full ahead of North London Derby after Gabriel Jesus update
arts.sum: More than a dozen Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur players might miss the North London Derby tonight due to injury after Gabriel Jesus became the latest confirmed absentee. That is the only seemingly season-ending injury across the two teams, but several players are still many weeks away from being available again.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Predicted Lineup vs. Tottenham Hotspur: North London Derby
arts.sum: After losing the first leg of the Carabao Cup semifinals, Arsenal have to advance in the FA Cup against a bitter rival.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Serie A giants rebuff first loan bid for striker?
arts.sum: Arsenal allegedly fail with their first offer to loan a Serie A forward who could be allowed to change clubs during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Gabriel Jesus injury: Arsenal victims of "too much football" with "big influence" sidelined - Ray Parlour
arts.sum: Former Arsenal midfielder Ray Parlour tells Sports Mole that the Gunners might be the latest side to fall victim of a congested schedule following Gabriel Jesus's injury.
